events.label: reasoning
events.text: We need answer JSON only. Need assess water heater T&P discharge pipe missing/trapped/reduced/terminated too high. Work stage rough-complete. Codes IPC 504, IRC P2804. T&P relief valve discharge pipe requirements: must be full size, terminate not more than 6 inches above floor or outside, no threads at terminus, no valves, no reduction, material rated for hot water, gravity drain, not trapped, visible termination. Missing/trapped/reduced/terminated too high = fail. Risk high due to scalding/flood/pressure explosion. Component conditions installed-defective, non-compliant. Percent complete maybe 80? Value not asked 0. Sound etc default. Findings list. Actions: install proper discharge pipe per code. Rationale. References IPC 504.6/504.7? IRC P2804.6. Need exact JSON shape. Let's craft.
